label: Survey cycle
labelLong: CCHS survey cycle
subject: demographics
description: Derived from dataset name; identifies CCHS cycle for each respondent
purpose: Identifies the CCHS cycle for each respondent. Used to derive survey year for the period component of the APC model and to label cycle-specific results.

label: Age (grouped continuous, years)
labelLong: Age - continuous
subject: demographics
description: Continuous age; preferred over DHHGAGE_A for APC model where available
purpose: Continuous age in years (midpoint-estimated in PUMF). The primary age input to the APC model. Cohort is derived as survey_year - age.

label: Sex
labelLong: Sex
subject: demographics
description: Sex (1=Male 2=Female). APC models run separately by sex
purpose: Sex. APC initiation and cessation models are fit separately for men and women because smoking trends differ substantially by sex. Also used to stratify Table 1.

label: Province of residence
labelLong: Province of residence
subject: demographics
description: Province/territory of residence. Used for provincial APC estimates
purpose: Province of residence. Used for provincial APC stratification (Stage 8 subgroup). Territories are pooled due to small sample sizes.

label: Master survey weight
labelLong: Survey sampling weight
subject: demographics
description: CCHS sampling weight. Required for all prevalence estimates and weighted APC models
purpose: Survey sampling weight. Applied in APC logistic regression as a case weight to produce nationally representative estimates.

label: Immigrant status (2007-2014 only)
labelLong: Immigrant status (D)
subject: demographics
description: Immigrant status derived (1=non-immigrant 2=immigrant 3=non-permanent resident). Used in MPoRT mortality adjustment
purpose: Immigrant status. Used in the MPoRT mortality correction to adjust for survival bias. Only available 2007-2014.

label: Cultural/racial origin (2007-2014 only)
labelLong: Cultural or racial origin (D/G)
subject: demographics
description: Cultural/racial origin. Not in all cycles (NA(c) where absent). Used for subgroup analysis; not a primary APC model variable
purpose: Cultural/racial origin. Retained for potential subgroup analyses. Only available in select cycles; will be NA(c) elsewhere.
reviewNotes: Not available all cycles

label: Education (3-cat)
labelLong: Highest education level - 3 categories
subject: demographics
description: Highest education (3-category: less than high school / high school graduate / post-secondary). Used for subgroup analysis. cchsflow harmonized from EDUADR04/EDUCDR04/EDUEDR04/EHG2DVR3.
purpose: Education (3-category). Included for descriptive purposes and potential subgroup analysis. Not available in 2019-20 or 2022 PUMF.
reviewNotes: Not available 2019-20 or 2022

label: Smoked 100+ cigs
labelLong: Ever smoked 100 or more cigarettes in lifetime
subject: smoking
description: Gate question: ever smoked >=100 cigarettes lifetime. Combined with SMK_01B and SMK_202 for never/current/former classification
purpose: Intermediate: input to SMKDSTY_A derivation. Gate variable: ever smoked 100+ cigarettes. Combined with SMK_01B and SMK_202 to classify respondents as never/current/former smoker for the APC numerator.
versionNotes: Synced to cchsflow v3 (smoking merged 2026-04-29, commit bd0df3ac)

label: Smoked 1 whole cig
labelLong: Ever smoked a whole cigarette
subject: smoking
description: Second gate for never-smoker definition: never smoked a whole cigarette AND <100 lifetime cigarettes = never smoker
purpose: Intermediate: input to SMKDSTY_A derivation. Gate variable: ever smoked a whole cigarette. Used with SMK_01A to define never-smoker status.
versionNotes: Synced to cchsflow v3 (smoking merged 2026-04-29, commit bd0df3ac)

label: Smoking type
labelLong: Type of smoker presently (daily/occasional/not at all)
subject: smoking
description: Current smoking frequency. Combined with SMK_01A/SMK_01B to derive 3-category status: never / current / former
purpose: Intermediate: input to SMKDSTY_A derivation. Current smoking frequency (daily/occasional/not at all). Combined with SMK_01A/SMK_01B to derive 3-category smoking status.
versionNotes: Synced to cchsflow v3 (smoking merged 2026-04-29, commit bd0df3ac)
